scripts.build: npm run build -w tiny-mood && npm run build -w tiny-mood-generate
scripts.generate: npm run build -w tiny-mood-generate && node packages/tinymood-generate/dist/cli.js fixtures/content fixtures/output-table.json --glove fixtures/mini-glove.txt
scripts.test: npm run build && node test/composeBackground.test.mjs && node smoke-test.mjs && node test/brand-getMoodBackground.test.mjs && node test/createBrandPalette.test.mjs && node packages/tinymood-generate/test/generate.test.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run dev -w demo
